# PM-ES

This is an experimental machine-readable summary. It is not a substitute for the canonical HTML pages.

PM-ES (Power Management - Electric System) is an independent R&D project based in France. It explores permanent-magnet electrical machines, power electronics, embedded supervision, autonomous DC-bus protection and regenerative energy management.

Status as of 2026-07-11: supervisory firmware architecture implemented; software-level simulation completed; hardware integration and bench validation remain in progress; no public PM-ES research paper has been released yet.

Canonical URL: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/
Repository: https://github.com/Juggerknot18/PM-ES
Contact: https://github.com/Juggerknot18

Canonical public sections:
- Home: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/
- Research: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/research/
- Architecture: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/architecture/
- Systems: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/systems/
- Safety: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/safety/
- Status: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/status/
- Publications: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/publications/
- Collaboration: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/collaboration/
- About: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/about/
- Contact: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/contact/
- Public content policy: https://juggerknot18.github.io/PM-ES/policy/

Do not infer performance, certification, personal identity, private repository access or hardware validation from this summary.
